name: tsl_clean_acquisition_baseline
description: [TSL S1] Baseline: explicit player acquisition with take verb produces grounded acquisition_signal with parser and gate evidence. No warnings expected. If TSL cannot report clean provenance for a simple explicit take, all other TSL probes are unreliable.

tsl_expected.notes: AP-mediated take: brass key transferred by AP before CB runs (skip_reason: empty_quarantine). TSL produces transfer_signal with provenance parser.action=take + ap_executed_transfer. acquisition_signals is correctly empty — CB never sees a player-container candidate on AP-dominated takes. transfer_signals confidence 0.80. warnings[] empty. Positive baseline for AP-mediated acquisitions — all transfer_grounded assertions depend on this path being demonstrably clean.

transfer_signals.notes: Standard AP-mediated transfer: ap_executed_transfer + parser.action=take are the dual-provenance pair for explicit player takes

world_prompt: I am in a small stone room with bare walls. A brass key rests on the stone floor near my feet.

turns.label: take_key
turns.action: I pick up the brass key.
